title: Privacy-preserving DNS resolver for community networks
abstract: This project develops an open-source DNS resolver that uses encrypted client queries and distributed resolution to preserve user privacy while maintaining performance suitable for community-run network infrastructure.
budgetUsage: Development (70%), testing and security audit (20%), documentation and community outreach (10%).
tasksBreakdown:
T1: Core resolver implementation — 3 months, 1 FTE @ 5k/month
T2: Encryption layer — 2 months, 1 FTE @ 5k/month
T3: Performance testing — 1 month, 0.5 FTE @ 5k/month
T4: Documentation and deployment guides — 1 month, 0.5 FTE @ 5k/month
